ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the telemetry record */,
  "asctime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the telemetry data reception */,
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UAV sending the data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission associated with the telemetry data */,
  "topic_from_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source topic of the telemetry data */,
  "topic_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination topic of the telemetry data */,
  "frame" TEXT /* Frame identifier for the message */,
  "offset_received" REAL /* Offset received in milliseconds */,
  "frame_delay" REAL /* Delay of the frame in milliseconds */,
  "msg_creation_delay" REAL /* Delay in message creation in milliseconds */,
  "consume_time" REAL /* Time taken to consume the message in milliseconds */,
  "size_data_received" REAL /* Size of data received in KB */,
  "process_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the message in milliseconds */,
  "size_data_sent" REAL /* Size of data sent in KB */,
  "send_time" REAL /* Time at which the data was sent */,
  "offset_sent" TEXT /* Offset sent information */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of telemetry data (e.g., video, sensor readings) */,
  "quality_of_service" TEXT /* Quality of service associated with the telemetry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_uav_id FOREIGN KEY ("uav_id") REFERENCES uavs ("uav_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uavs" (
  "uav_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UAV */,
  "uav_name" TEXT /* Name of the UAV */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the UAV */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the UAV */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Deployment status of the UAV */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last telemetry data received from the UAV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uav_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., video, sensor readings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sizes" (
  "data_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data size record */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry data record */,
  "size_data_received" REAL /* Size of data received in KB */,
  "size_data_sent" REAL /* Size of data sent in KB */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate for the data transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_times" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the processing time record */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry record */,
  "process_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the message in milliseconds */,
  "msg_creation_delay" REAL /* Delay in message creation in milliseconds */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the telemetry data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the frame delay record */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry record */,
  "frame_delay" REAL /* Delay of the frame in milliseconds */,
  "offset_received" REAL /* Offset received in milliseconds */,
  "delay_category" TEXT /* Category of the frame delay (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the telemetry data */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the telemetry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telemetry record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., delay, error) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Category of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
